text:
# April 23, 2026  
Almost the weekend. Feeling exhausted but the week went well.  
Morning: big presentation at office. The client loved our revised proposal. Great team effort. We went out for a small celebration at a café near Regal Square.  
Preeti called. She's feeling under the weather. A bit of fever. Came home early to help with the kids. She insisted she's fine but I could see she's tired.  
Mohan and Aryan had their playdate today. They played cricket in the compound with some other kids. Watched them from the balcony. It's nice to see them getting along again.  
Neetish helped Preeti with dinner despite not feeling well herself. She's become so responsible.  
Evening walk with Browny was quick. It's getting warmer in Indore. Summer is here.  
Preeti is resting now. Made her hot chai and some toast. She's better already though she'll never admit it.  
The kids are sleeping. Quiet moment. Need to plan for the weekend tomorrow.
